scripts.eval:contract: pnpm --filter @repo/ai-metadata build && pnpm --filter @repo/core build && pnpm --filter @repo/cli build && node scripts/validate-cli-contract.mjs
scripts.eval:queries: pnpm --filter @repo/ai-metadata build && pnpm --filter @repo/core build && pnpm --filter @repo/cli build && node scripts/evaluate-query-set.mjs
